title: atheos #0112
definition:
1) without God, knowing and worshipping no God
 2) denying the gods, esp. the recognised gods of the state
 3) godless, ungodly
 4) abandoned by the gods
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) without God, knowing and worshipping no God
 2) denying the gods, esp. the recognised gods of the state
 3) godless, ungodly
